highlights.text: Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum & Seine River cruise
Palace of Versailles royal apartments & gardens

itinerary.title: Paris Highlights Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Eiffel Tower • Louvre • Seine Cruise • Montmartre • Versailles
itinerary.overview: Discover the dazzling charm and historic grandeur of the City of Light with TRAGUIN's curated family itinerary. Designed for excitement and comfort, this Paris Family Highlights package offers a flawless blend of monumental exploration, artistic discovery, and leisurely strolls through charming quarters. Experience the best of French hospitality with handpicked hotels and exclusive services.
itinerary.seo_title: FR-001 | Paris Highlights Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Paris family package (FR-001): Eiffel Tower, Louvre, Seine River cruise, Versailles, and Montmartre.

days.title: Arrival in Paris & Seine River Cruise
days.description: Arrive in elegant Paris. Your private TRAGUIN transfer will escort you to your handpicked hotel. Enjoy a relaxing evening with a scenic Seine River cruise, admiring the city's stunning landmarks illuminated at night.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport reception, Seine River night cruise
Meals Included: Welcome arrangements on arrival

days.title: Eiffel Tower & Louvre Discovery
days.description: Explore the iconic attractions of Paris. Visit the Eiffel Tower and the Louvre Museum. This curated experience offers deep insights into Paris's history, culture, and iconic attractions.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Eiffel Tower visit, Louvre Museum guided tour

days.title: Palace of Versailles
days.description: Embark on a grand excursion to the Palace of Versailles. Explore the breathtaking state apartments, Hall of Mirrors, and the magnificent royal gardens.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Palace of Versailles, Hall of Mirrors, royal gardens

days.title: Montmartre & Artistic Charm
days.description: A full day of immersive fun exploring the artistic streets of Montmartre. Visit the Sacré-Cœur Basilica, enjoy local art, and taste French cuisine.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Montmartre walking tour, Sacré-Cœur Basilica

days.title: Departure
days.description: Enjoy a final family breakfast. Your private TRAGUIN chauffeur ensures a comfortable transfer to the airport, completing your premium Paris experience.

inclusions.text: 04 Nights in handpicked ultra-luxury family hotel in Paris
Private executive chauffeur-driven luxury ground transfers
Seine River night cruise on arrival evening
Eiffel Tower and Louvre Museum guided sightseeing
Palace of Versailles excursion with royal gardens access
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated on-ground family concierge support
International airfare and France entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
